summary: Generated and wired a Route Replay event glyph sprite sheet so replay stages, Event Proof, Path Map mini-events, and the Visual Asset Vault communicate event type visually.

queries: game UI icon design visual hierarchy event types
dashboard iconography visual hierarchy status icons UX
timeline icons activity feed UX pattern
pattern_notes: Status indicators become more scannable when icon, shape, color, and label work together.
Timeline and activity-feed rows should include compact visual indicators beside short activity descriptions.
Game UI can use spatial and meta visual cues to make state legible without adding more explanatory text.

image_generation.prompt_summary: A 3x2 premium sci-fi fantasy event glyph sprite sheet: proof crystal/document, trace signal path, outcome trophy, gate lock, task cog/checkpoint, and service beacon, with no text, no logos, and consistent spacing.

ui_contract: Keep glyph selection data-driven from snapshot event kind and nearby event text without schema changes.
Use the generated 3x2 sheet as a CSS sprite for proof, trace, outcome, gate, task, and service event types.
Render glyphs in Route Replay stage cards, Event Proof headers, and Path Map mini-event rows.
Register the glyph sheet as a system asset in the Visual Asset Vault.
Keep all glyph rows responsive and non-overlapping on mobile and desktop widths.

image_file.evidence: route-replay-event-glyph-sheet-20260618.png is a valid 1536x1024 PNG copied into web/assets/system.

static.evidence: node --check web/app.js, snapshot JSON validation, edited-file ASCII checks, and local HTTP 200 for the page and glyph sheet passed.

browser_path_map.evidence: After NEXT, replay and Event Proof glyphs used glyph-service at 54px and 46px with background-position 100% 100%; mini-events rendered glyph-outcome and glyph-proof crops; no bad rectangles or console errors.

responsive.evidence: Each tested viewport rendered 1 replay glyph, 1 Event Proof glyph, 18 mini-event glyphs, and 20 glyphs with the sprite-sheet background, with no bad rectangles or console errors.

browser_asset_vault.evidence: The system Asset Vault filter rendered a Route Replay event glyph sheet card with image src ./assets/system/route-replay-event-glyph-sheet-20260618.png at 317x154.
